description: OpenCode — open-source, provider-agnostic agentic coding CLI; drive cloud or local models (Ollama / LM Studio / any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) through the same PTY
description_zh: OpenCode —— 开源、模型无关的智能编码 CLI；通过同一套 PTY 驱动云端或本地模型（Ollama / LM Studio / 任意 OpenAI 兼容端点）

configSchema.label: Models & Authentication
configSchema.description: OpenCode is provider-agnostic. Configure cloud providers with `opencode auth login`, or point the fields below at a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM). Settings here are written into a per-session config opendray hands OpenCode via OPENCODE_CONFIG — your own ~/.config/opencode config still applies underneath.
configSchema.description_zh: OpenCode 与模型无关。云端用 `opencode auth login` 登录，或在下方字段填入本地 OpenAI 兼容端点（Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM）。这里的设置会写入 opendray 通过 OPENCODE_CONFIG 注入的 per-session 配置 —— 你自己的 ~/.config/opencode 配置仍在底层生效。

configSchema.label: Local Endpoint Base URL
configSchema.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. When set, opendray registers a provider named `opendray-local` and selects it by default.
configSchema.description_zh: OpenAI 兼容的 base URL。填写后 opendray 会注册名为 `opendray-local` 的 provider 并默认选用。

configSchema.label: Local Model ID
configSchema.description: Model id served at the local endpoint (used as opendray-local/<id>).
configSchema.description_zh: 本地端点上提供的模型 id（用作 opendray-local/<id>）。

configSchema.label: Local Endpoint API Key
configSchema.label_zh: 本地端点 API 密钥
configSchema.description: Optional API key for the local endpoint. Most local servers ignore it.
configSchema.description_zh: 本地端点的可选 API 密钥。多数本地服务器会忽略它。

configSchema.label: Default Model (provider/model)
configSchema.description: Default model in provider/model form. Overrides the local default above when both are set.
configSchema.description_zh: provider/model 形式的默认模型。与上方本地默认同时设置时，此项优先。

configSchema.label: Disable opendray skills
configSchema.description: Skip injecting the opendray skill index + memory guidance. Left off (default), opendray writes an AGENTS.md into a per-session scratch dir and references it from the generated OPENCODE_CONFIG instructions; turn this on to suppress that.
configSchema.description_zh: 不注入 opendray skill 索引与记忆引导。默认关闭时 opendray 会在 per-session 临时目录写一份 AGENTS.md，并从生成的 OPENCODE_CONFIG instructions 引用它；打开此项则不再注入。
